title: psychotria pallescens
intro: Psychotria pallescens, also known as Pale-leaved Wild Coffee or Pale Wild Coffee, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The leaves and roots of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Psychotria pallescens include its ability to alleviate fever, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots are often dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness their medicinal properties.
